notes: Current macro regime shows persistent inflationary pressures with Fed maintaining hawkish stance. CME FedWatch indicates markets pricing higher probability of no cuts than Kalshi markets suggest. Recent Fed revision of 2026 inflation forecast to 2.7% from 2.4% supports sticky inflation narrative. GDP nowcasts trending lower throughout Q1 2026, creating value in betting against strong growth expectations.
